content.en:
Rumble!

Ye Tian collided with the killing machine of the Protoss powerhouse in the void and let out a roar.

The momentum of the two was superimposed to the level of terror, and the battle was about to break out.

From the aura of the Protoss powerhouse, Ye Tian felt that the other party's physical body was also very powerful.

After all, this Protoss is a rebel against the heavens, breaking the boundaries of the universe, and can continue to improve the strength of the physical body after the god level, and the Protoss is a super clan, and it must have a cultivation method similar to the Eighteen Golden Body Recipes to increase the strength of the physical body.

Therefore, it is not difficult for this Protoss powerhouse to continue to improve his physical strength, and the resources of the Protoss far exceed those of the Human Race, so the physical body of this Protoss powerhouse is also very terrifying.

However, compared to Ye Tianyi, the physical body of this Protoss powerhouse is nothing.

Ye Tian had obtained too many inheritances, even such as the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

And he has accumulated too much, and when he was at the great god level, his combat power had already reached the top level of the son of the era.

Not only is his physical body extremely terrifying, but even his immortal power has been compressed to an astonishing 36 times.

And his attraction was far surpassed, and the hearts of others were compressed by 36 times, which could be said to be richer than the immortal power of some cosmic gods.

This Protoss powerhouse was far inferior to Ye Tian, otherwise, he would have already hit the Universe God or even the Supreme Realm, and it would be impossible for him to stay at the galaxy level all the time.

But.

After all, this Protoss powerhouse is now at the peak realm of the galaxy level, and he has cultivated for countless years, and his cultivation on the Great Dao must be higher than Ye Tian's.

With a big difference of realm, it is not easy for Ye Tian to defeat the other party.

If it was before entering the ancient well space, Ye Tian might not be more powerful than this Protoss powerhouse, but now that he was immersed in the strange water quality, his body was tempered by strange energy, and the power of the Chaos Dao perfectly matched his physical body, and he could exert the power of the Chaos Dao even stronger.

You must know that the power of the Great Dao crushes everything, and it was only difficult for Ye Tian to exert the power of the Chaos Great Dao before.

But now that he can exert the power of the Chaos Dao, the increased combat power is very terrifying.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch, before you die, let you know whose hands you died in. Among the Protoss I have a title, called Allah the Immortal!"

The strong of the Protoss will not destroy Allah, said.

Rumble!!!

A huge physical dharma appeared in the body of Allah the Immortal.

This syntax is full of the rules of death and the power of the avenue, which means that Allah the Immortal is walking the avenue of death.

And the Immortal Death Dao of Allah is holding a spear.

"The avenue of death and the path of the gun, the immortal Allah actually combined the avenue of death with the path of the gun, and his avenue realm has reached the realm of the law phase!"

Ye Tian was a little dignified, his Dao Dao realm was still in the Great Dao Shape Realm, and he was still a little short of the Dao Law Realm.

The realm of Allah and Immortal is undoubtedly higher than him, having reached the realm of the Dharma phase, and has also reached the extremely high level of the realm of the Dharma phase.

However, after all, Allah of Immortality has cultivated for a long time, and with the talent of Allah of Immortality, it would be abnormal if he did not comprehend his own path to the realm of Dharma for such a long time.

At the same time, the shadow of the Great Thousand Worlds appeared on the body of Allah the Immortal, and the terrifying power of the world poured out with the shot of Allah the Immortal.

"The supreme level spear path is peerless, and the great thousand divine spears are great!"

Rumble!

The terrifying Daqian Divine Spear seemed to completely crush the void that Ye Tian was in.

Even if some top cosmic gods face this shot of Allah, it is estimated that they will not be able to resist, and they may be killed with one shot.

"Sky Moon Knife!"

Ye Tian slashed out this knife with all his strength, completely bursting out the power of the Chaos Dao.

At the same time, the power of the Heavenly Realm-level Chaos Ancient Realm in Ye Tian's body burst out, showing the power of the supreme-level sword path mastery.

Bang!!!

The Supreme Gun Dao Peerless and the Supreme Knife Path Peerless collided.

Ye Tian retreated dozens of miles, and the immortal Allah also retreated nearly a hundred miles.

In one confrontation, Allah the Immortal is slightly defeated.

"How is it possible, you are just the pinnacle of the galaxy level!"

Allah the Immortal was stunned, he never expected that he would fall into the downwind.

Originally, he thought that he could kill Ye Tian in seconds with one shot, after all, Ye Tian was only a galaxy-level peak realm, a big realm behind him.

How big is the gap between a great realm, and he is not a weak person, but a person who goes against the sky, and he is the first person in the universe who goes against the sky, how talented is it against the sky! How terrible is the combat power!

But even so, he was even a little inferior when he was a big realm higher than Ye Tian.

"Nothing is impossible, in terms of physical strength, you are not as good as me, in terms of the degree of immortal power compression, you are not as good as me, and in terms of the level of physical strength, you are also inferior to me. Even if you're a big level higher than me, I can still beat you!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

"I don't believe it!"

Allah is not extinguished.

Soon the two faced each other again.

In fact, the attack of Immortal Allah is indeed very strong, and it can cause damage to Ye Tian, but Ye Tian used the sea of death flowers to divert the damage, so Immortal Allah does not want to hurt Ye Tian.

On the other hand, Ye Tian's attack can really hurt the immortal Allah, after all, the immutable Allah is walking the road of death, not the road of life, and his degree of recovery is not as good as Ye Tian.

No matter what secret techniques Allah cast, no matter how terrifying the attack broke out, there was no way to really hurt Ye Tian.

As time passed, Ye Tian's advantage became greater and greater, and Allah the Immortal gradually became unable to exert his true strength due to more and more injuries.

In this battle of life and death, Ye Tian has always felt the impact of the Immortal Allah Law Phase Realm Death Dao, and gradually has some understanding of the Dao Law Phase Realm.

In addition, Ye Tian was not very far away from the realm of the Great Dao Law Phase, but now that he had a little aura, countless insights appeared in his mind.

Suddenly, countless fluorescences appeared in Ye Tian's mind, and this fluorescence was very similar to the fluorescence of strange water quality.

This is a part of the strange energy stored in Ye Tian's soul, and now all of it has burst out, giving Ye Tian a rapid epiphany on the Chaos Dao.

"The Great Dao Law Phase is the essence of the Great Dao of Enlightenment, the power of the Great Dao that dominates itself, and the power of the Great Dao is blended together to form a special Law Phase!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

Gradually, the phantom of the Chaos Avenue appeared on Ye Tian's body.

The phantom of this chaotic avenue resembles an ocean, which is the phase of the chaotic sea.

Ye Tian had only condensed the Chaos Dao Law Phase at this time, and he had not really condensed the Law Phase.

"What? You're almost condensing the Fa Phase!"

Allah the Immortal was stunned.

He knew that Ye Tian was walking the Chaos Dao, which was the most difficult avenue to walk, and it was also very difficult to condense the Chaos Dao Law Phase.

But the power of the Chaos Dao is extremely terrifying, just the shape of the Great Dao is comparable to the ordinary Dao Law Phase, if Ye Tian condenses the Dao Law Phase, he can crush his Death Dao Law Aspect in an instant.

"Run!"

Immortal Allah had this thought, and now he is no longer Ye Tian's opponent, and if Ye Tian condenses the Chaos Dao, he will not even have any hope of escaping.

He didn't want to die, he also wanted to impact the cosmic god, the master, the supreme, and even become a transcendent.

If it had fallen here, it would have been gone.

This place is very special, once he falls here, even the Supreme has no way to resurrect him, and once he dies here, he is really dead.
